title: Start Here
content_raw:
Start Here

Your journey to financial confidence starts here. Pick your country below and follow four simple steps — banking, credit, transfers, and taxes — in the order that actually matters.

Your Path

Your 4 Steps in the USA

Follow these in order — each one makes the next easier.

Step 1🏦
Banking

Open a US bank account — the foundation everything else builds on.

Read the guide →
Step 2💳
Credit

Start building US credit history, even without an SSN.

Read the guide →
Step 3💸
Transfers

Compare the cheapest ways to send money to family back home.

Read the guide →
Step 4🧾
Taxes & Budgeting

Understand your first US tax filing and what to expect.

Read the guide →
Step 1🏦
Banking

Open your first Canadian bank account — the foundation everything else builds on.

Read the guide →
Step 2💳
Credit

Start building Canadian credit history from zero.

Read the guide →
Step 3💸
Transfers

Compare the cheapest ways to send money to family back home.

Read the guide →
Step 4🧾
Taxes & Budgeting

Understand your first CRA tax filing as a newcomer.

Read the guide →
Quick Answers

Not Sure Where to Start?

Answer whichever sounds like you — each links straight to the guide that helps.

"I don't have a bank account yet."
🇺🇸 Best Banks in the USA → 🇨🇦 Best Banks in Canada →
"I want to start building credit."
🇺🇸 Credit Cards, No SSN → 🇨🇦 Credit Cards in Canada →
"I need to send money to family back home."
🇺🇸 Transfer Apps from the USA → 🇨🇦 Transfer Apps from Canada →
Free Ebook
Build Your Credit Score in the USA — 2026 Edition

A step-by-step ebook for newcomers with no US credit history — what to open first, and in what order.

Get the Free Ebook →

📬 Get Our Newsletter

Get our newsletter — the latest guides and money tips for newcomers, free.

[wpforms id="48766"]

100% free · No spam · Unsubscribe anytime · Educational only

This page is for general educational purposes only and is not financial, tax, or immigration advice. Guides linked above reflect our independent research — see our How We Test and Editorial Policy for methodology. © 2026 MoneyAbroadGuide.com
